headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 18, 2026**
article:
The Chicago Cubs dominated the New York Mets in a 12-4 victory, with Moisés Ballesteros leading the Mets' batting effort with 2 hits, including a home run, and 3 RBIs. In other action, the Baltimore Orioles secured a 6-4 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Daniel Schneemann leading the Orioles' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs. The Atlanta Braves also secured a 9-0 victory over the Philadelphia Phillies, with Austin Riley leading the Braves' offense with a pair of home runs and four RBIs.

Several players have been placed on the injured list, including Seattle Mariners first baseman Patrick Wisdom, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left oblique strain. Other players affected include Zach McKinstry of the Detroit Tigers, Josh Hader of the Houston Astros, Daniel Palencia of the Chicago Cubs, Ken Waldichuk of the Washington Nationals, Chris Martin of the Texas Rangers, Luis Curvelo of the Texas Rangers, and Cody Bradford of the Texas Rangers.

The Los Angeles Dodgers have made a move to bolster their pitching staff, acquiring right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott from the Baltimore Orioles. The Dodgers traded RHP Axel Perez to the Orioles in exchange for McDermott. The New York Mets also made a trade, sending LHP Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash.

top_news.title: **Mets Suffer 8-Run Loss to Cubs**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs dominated the New York Mets in a 12-4 victory, with the Cubs' offense putting up 12 runs. Moisés Ballesteros led the Mets' batting effort with 2 hits, including a home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Guardians 6-4**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 6-4 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Daniel Schneemann leading the Orioles' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs. Rico Garcia earned the win for the Orioles, while Ryan Helsley secured the save.

top_news.title: **Braves Blast Phillies 9-0**
top_news.summary: The Atlanta Braves dominated the Philadelphia Phillies, securing a 9-0 victory. Austin Riley led the Braves' offense with a pair of home runs and four RBIs.

top_news.title: **Giants Take Down Nationals 10-5**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants secured a 10-5 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Logan Webb earning the win. Heliot Ramos led the Giants' offense with a home run and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Mariners Place Patrick Wisdom on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners first baseman Patrick Wisdom has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left oblique strain, effective retroactive to April 15, 2026.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Acquire RHP Chayce McDermott in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers have made a move to bolster their pitching staff, acquiring right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott from the Baltimore Orioles.
